name: Mama's Too
teaser: Just had one of the best slices of my life from the UWS location. Maybe everyone who worships this place is right?
review: I always thought they burned the squares, but just had one of the best slices of my life from the UWS location, and I hear the Village spot is already in rare form, so maybe everyone else who worships this place is right?
headsUp: The squares sell out fast. Get there before the dinner rush.
update: UWS location has caught up to the Village original. Both are firing.
address: West Village & Upper West Side, New York
